properties.description: Locks the Rocket Engine, when set to 1. Unlocks it, when set to 0.
Sets the desired output pressure of the Rocket Engine to the passed value, in kilo pascal.
Turns the Rocked Engine on, when set to 1. Turns it off, when set to 0.
Returns whether the Rocket Engine is turned on and receives power. (0 for no, 1 for yes)
Returns whether the Rocket Engine is flashing an error. (0 for no, 1 for yes)
Returns the current output pressure of the Rocket Engine, in kilo pascal.
Returns the current output temperature of the Rocket Engine, in kelvin.
Returns a range from 0.0 to 1.0. Returns the percentage ratio of the amount of oxygen in the output gas of the Rocket Engine.
Returns a range from 0.0 to 1.0. Returns the percentage ratio of the amount of carbon dioxide in the output gas of the Rocket Engine.
Returns a range from 0.0 to 1.0. Returns the percentage ratio of the amount of nitrogen in the output gas of the Rocket Engine.
Returns a range from 0.0 to 1.0. Returns the percentage ratio of the amount of pollutant in the output gas of the Rocket Engine.
Returns a range from 0.0 to 1.0. Returns the percentage ratio of the amount of volatiles in the output gas of the Rocket Engine.
Returns a range from 0.0 to 1.0. Returns the percentage ratio of the amount of water in the output gas of the Rocket Engine.
Returns the maximum amount of output pressure of the Rocket Engine, in kilo pascal. (5000kPa)
Returns a range from 0.0 to 1.0. Returns the percentage ratio of the current output pressure of the Rocket Engine.
Returns the current amount of power, required by the Rocket Engine, in watts.
